nodes.name: CONFLUENCE_FORMAT_INSTRUCTIONS.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative reference spec mapping every Confluence storage-format element (headings, text effects, links, images, code blocks, tables, macros, layouts, ri/ac namespaces) to its GitLab-Markdown handling, governing the html_to_gitlab_md.py converter for Confluence Data Center 8.5.x.
nodes.languageNotes: 19 numbered rule sections plus element-priority and selector-priority ordering tables that the converter's _normalise_code_blocks() and _find_content_root() must follow.

nodes.name: Convert.Linux.Readme.md
nodes.summary: Linux usage guide for the HTML-to-GitLab-Markdown converter covering prerequisites, UTF-8 handling, single-file and batch invocation, CLI options, and verification with an example run.

nodes.name: Convert.Windows.Readme.md
nodes.summary: Windows usage guide for the HTML-to-GitLab-Markdown converter covering prerequisites, PYTHONUTF8 console encoding, single-file and batch invocation, CLI options, and verification with an example run.
